summary.pendingSurveysHelper: Requests that still need your answers
summary.productTicketsHelper: Bug reports, support requests, product blockers

createSection.title: Create a new ticket
createSection.description: Choose the correct channel so super admin can pick up the issue in the right queue.
createSection.productDescription: Bugs, missing flows, support requests, or anything blocking normal product usage.
createSection.systemDescription: Platform incidents, unstable service, infrastructure errors, or operational issues.

recentTickets.title: Recent tickets
recentTickets.description: The latest feedback handled inside the dedicated product and system queues.
recentTickets.emptyDescription: Create a product or system ticket to start the feedback flow.

pendingSurveys.title: Pending surveys
pendingSurveys.description: Scheduled feedback requests are separated into their own survey queue.
pendingSurveys.emptyDescription: When the system creates a scheduled survey, it will appear here.

product.heroDescription: Report bugs, ask for support, or request missing product flows here.
product.totalHelper: All product-related requests from your account
product.openHelper: Issues still being handled by super admin
product.resolvedHelper: Requests that already reached a final state
product.listDescription: Track replies and handling progress without mixing in system incidents or surveys.
product.emptyDescription: Open a ticket when product issues block your work.

system.heroDescription: Use this queue for outages, service instability, infrastructure issues, and other platform incidents.
system.totalHelper: All system-related requests from your account
system.resolvedHelper: Incidents that already have a final status
system.listDescription: Keep infrastructure and service incidents in a separate list from product requests.
system.emptyDescription: Report platform incidents here when the issue is not limited to a single product flow.

header.title: Survey queue
header.description: Scheduled feedback forms are separated from support tickets so they can be managed independently.

summary.pendingHelper: Requests that still need your answers
summary.flowHelper: Survey forms stay out of the product/system ticket queues

list.title: Pending survey requests
list.description: Answer these structured forms separately from support conversations.
list.emptyDescription: When a survey is created for you, it will appear in this dedicated queue.
